'''âd-v-th''' ('''kadavath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:codiversify|codiversify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-v-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:codiversify|codiversify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-v-th
|-
! Lemma
| kadavath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidavath|thidavath]] || [[word:jidavath|jidavath]] || [[word:shidavath|shidavath]] || [[word:kidavath|kidavath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudavath|thuthudavath]] || [[word:jujudavath|jujudavath]] || [[word:shushudavath|shushudavath]] || [[word:kukudavath|kukudavath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudavath|thudavath]] || [[word:judavath|judavath]] || [[word:shudavath|shudavath]] || [[word:kudavath|kudavath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudavath|thudavath]] || [[word:judavath|judavath]] || [[word:shudavath|shudavath]] || [[word:kudavath|kudavath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedavath|thedavath]] || [[word:jedavath|jedavath]] || [[word:shedavath|shedavath]] || [[word:kedavath|kedavath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodavath|thothodavath]] || [[word:jojodavath|jojodavath]] || [[word:shoshodavath|shoshodavath]] || [[word:kokodavath|kokodavath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodavath|thodavath]] || [[word:jodavath|jodavath]] || [[word:shodavath|shodavath]] || [[word:kodavath|kodavath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodavath|thodavath]] || [[word:jodavath|jodavath]] || [[word:shodavath|shodavath]] || [[word:kodavath|kodavath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdavath|thĂŠdavath]] || [[word:jĂŠdavath|jĂŠdavath]] || [[word:shĂŠdavath|shĂŠdavath]] || [[word:kĂŠdavath|kĂŠdavath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadavath|thathadavath]] || [[word:jajadavath|jajadavath]] || [[word:shashadavath|shashadavath]] || [[word:kakadavath|kakadavath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadavath|thadavath]] || [[word:jadavath|jadavath]] || [[word:shadavath|shadavath]] || [[word:kadavath|kadavath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadavath|thadavath]] || [[word:jadavath|jadavath]] || [[word:shadavath|shadavath]] || [[word:kadavath|kadavath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadavath|shadavath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadavath|goshadavath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadavath|gokishadavath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadavathnĂŒ|shadavathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadavathnknĂŒ|goshadavathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavathnĂŒ|gokishadavathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadavathshĂ«|shadavathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadavathnkshĂ«|goshadavathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadavathshĂ«|gokishadavathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavathro|shadavathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavathnkro|goshadavathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavathro|gokishadavathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavathmu|shadavathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavathnkmu|goshadavathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavathmu|gokishadavathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadavathsher|shadavathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadavathnksher|goshadavathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadavathsher|gokishadavathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadavathng|shadavathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadavathnkng|goshadavathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadavathng|gokishadavathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadavathya|shadavathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadavathnkya|goshadavathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadavathya|gokishadavathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadavathyam|shadavathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadavathnkyam|goshadavathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadavathyam|gokishadavathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadavathnĂŒshĂ«|shadavathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadavathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshadavathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadavathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishadavathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavathnĂŒro|shadavathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavathnknĂŒro|goshadavathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavathnĂŒro|gokishadavathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavathnĂŒmu|shadavathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavathnknĂŒmu|goshadavathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavathnĂŒmu|gokishadavathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadavathshĂ«nĂŒ|shadavathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadavathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshadavathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishadavathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavathshĂ«ro|shadavathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavathnkshĂ«ro|goshadavathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavathshĂ«ro|gokishadavathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavathshĂ«mu|shadavathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavathnkshĂ«mu|goshadavathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavathshĂ«mu|gokishadavathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadavathronĂŒ|shadavathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadavathnkronĂŒ|goshadavathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavathronĂŒ|gokishadavathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadavathroshĂ«|shadavathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadavathnkroshĂ«|goshadavathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadavathroshĂ«|gokishadavathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadavathromu|shadavathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadavathnkromu|goshadavathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadavathromu|gokishadavathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadavathmunĂŒ|shadavathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadavathnkmunĂŒ|goshadavathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadavathmunĂŒ|gokishadavathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadavathmushĂ«|shadavathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadavathnkmushĂ«|goshadavathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadavathmushĂ«|gokishadavathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadavathmuro|shadavathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadavathnkmuro|goshadavathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadavathmuro|gokishadavathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
